description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts [Shock->Electrocute]. Enemies afflicted with [Shock->Electrocute] are stunned for [1.8 sec->2sec].
For 6sec, restores HP every 1sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take [25%->60%] reduced Magic DMG.
For 7sec, increases the ATK of all allies, Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Rate by [420->150].

Every 15sec, deals Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts [Shock->Electrocute] for 20sec, and stuns the target for 0.6sec on a Critical Hit. Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with [Shock->Electrocute], stacking up to 3 times. [Shock->Electrocute]: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [30%->10%] for 10 sec.
If the number of enemies is [1 or fewer->3 or fewer], removes the target's beneficial effects.
When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by 200% and their Mana by 100 per sec for 5 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec.

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a [ {0}%->30% ] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by [{2}%->{1}%] for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for [2 sec->0.5 sec].
